headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter). Avoid bold/black for a more elegant, editorial look. Use font-light (300) for massive numbers, font-medium (500) for card titles.

body.usage: Extremely crisp geometric font, perfect for dense financial data and numbers. Use tabular-nums for tables and balances.

charts_palette.guidance: Use Recharts. Minimalist axes (no grid lines or very faint stroke-dasharray). Use standard solid colors avoiding heavy gradients. Maintain high contrast for data lines/bars.

surfaces_and_shadows.cards: Flat background. Light mode: subtle 1px border (border-black/5), no default shadow. Hover state: subtle lift (-translate-y-0.5) and soft shadow (shadow-sm). Dark mode: 1px border (border-white/5), flat.
surfaces_and_shadows.headers: MUST use Glassmorphism to prevent text clash when scrolling. Light: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5. Dark: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5. NEVER use completely transparent backgrounds.
surfaces_and_shadows.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog/Sheet. Ensure generous padding (p-8) and close buttons are subtly placed.
surfaces_and_shadows.border_radius: Subtle roundness. Use rounded-xl for main cards, rounded-lg for inner elements/buttons. Avoid extreme pill shapes except for status badges.

layouts.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid Strategy. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap strategy: gap-6. Hero balance card spans col-span-full md:col-span-2. Use generous internal padding for cards (p-6 or p-8).
layouts.spacing_scale: Use 2-3x more spacing than default. Emphasize whitespace. Use py-12 to py-20 between major sections.
layouts.mobile_first: Always start with flex-col or grid-cols-1. Ensure tables are wrapped in a horizontally scrollable container.

components.buttons: Premium minimal. Primary: Solid dark green (light mode) / Soft jade (dark mode). Secondary: Outline with transparent background, hover state with subtle tinted gray.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Remove vertical borders. Subtly tinted row hover state. Align numeric data to the right using tabular-nums.
components.forms: Shadcn form components. Inputs must have clear focus states (ring-2) with primary color. Labels must be small, uppercase, and slightly muted.

interactions_and_motion.hover: All clickable elements must have a distinct hover state. Text colors on hover must be explicitly defined (e.g. hover:text-primary).
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use specific properties (e.g., transition-colors duration-200), NEVER use 'transition-all'.
interactions_and_motion.active: Use active:scale-95 for buttons to provide tactile feedback.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Check text over colored backgrounds.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-balance', data-testid='transaction-filter').
accessibility.focus: Maintain clear focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2) for keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent.file_type: Ensure all components and pages are built as .js files, NOT .tsx.
instructions_to_main_agent.mobile_menu_fix: Currently mobile menu hides options. Fix: Implement a bottom tab navigation for 3-4 primary routes, and a 'More' (Mais) button that opens a Shadcn Drawer or Sheet to display the remaining navigation links.
instructions_to_main_agent.feature_payments: Add 'Semestral' and 'Trimestral' options to the recurrences/installments payment frequency dropdowns.
instructions_to_main_agent.feature_month_selector: Update the month selector logic: Lock/hide the month display if no month is actively selected, and persist/maintain the last selected month in the state (use localStorage or URL search params for persistence).
instructions_to_main_agent.ui_library: Use Shadcn/UI for complex interactive components (Dialog, Select, Table, Drawer/Sheet) and customize them using the provided CSS variables.

GENERAL_UI_UX_DESIGN_GUIDELINES: Prioritize optical alignment over strict geometric alignment.
Never use generic AI icons. Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react for premium minimalist icons.
Use layered shadows (ambient + direct) where shadow is permitted, but lean towards crisp 1px borders for the minimalist feel.
Nested radii: Child border radius should be equal to or less than parent radius to maintain concentricity.
Design for realistic data (handle long names, zero balances gracefully).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not build generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
NEVER apply universal transition ('transition: all'). This breaks transforms.
NEVER center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Use sonner for toasts, located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.js
Ensure glass-morphism effects use backdrop filters (backdrop-blur-xl) and an explicit background color with opacity, never completely transparent.
Use real text/data, NEVER placeholder text.
